texto: Have you started already? Keep it up! Are you getting tired? Don't give up! Did you quit? You can do it again! Great accomplishments do not come with big steps
autor: they come with little steps taken in regular installments! Do it and do it again and again!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de they come with little steps taken in regular installments! Do it and do it again and again! que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Have you started already? Keep it up! Are you getting tired? Don't give up! Did you quit? You can…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, israelmore-ayivor, the-great-hand-book-of-quotes, com foco em the-great-hand-book-of-quotes.
